title: Smoky German Crumble Potato Bake
description: A hearty, comforting potato bake infused with smoky German flavors and topped with a sweet crumble. Perfect for a cold winter evening.
instructions: Peel and thinly slice the potatoes.
In a large bowl, toss the potatoes with olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic, salt, and pepper.
Transfer the potatoes to a baking dish and set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix together the Greek yogurt and chopped parsley.
Spread the yogurt mixture evenly over the potatoes.
Sprinkle the sweet German crumble over the top of the potatoes.
Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
